root_cause: The billing-worker deployment upgraded the event envelope client to an incompatible version, causing job deserialization failures and queue backlog growth.
supporting_evidence: Queue depth increases immediately after the billing-worker image rollout.
Logs show event deserialization failures with a changed envelope field.
Database contention is not present, making the lock-contention distractor unlikely.
acceptable_remediations: Roll back the billing-worker image or dependency lockfile to the last known compatible event client version.
Pin the compatible event envelope dependency version and add contract validation in CI.
Reprocess failed jobs once workers are healthy again.
required_reasoning_steps: Correlate queue backlog growth with the dependency-backed image rollout.
Use the deserialization error to distinguish dependency incompatibility from database issues.
Prefer rollback and compatibility checks over database tuning.
